notes:
Ember 1.9.1 — Ember Link fixes + security dashboard actions

• Kindle/e-ink: the live screen feed no longer flashes black between frames — the view now holds the last frame until the new one is fully decoded, then swaps.
• Kindle: the Fullscreen button now works even when the browser silently ignores the real Fullscreen API — it falls back to a rotated, filled 'landscape' view automatically.
• Fixed the Run/Send button text overflowing its box on the phone remote.
• Removed decorative emoji from the phone remote's quick-action buttons in favor of plain text (Kindle e-ink friendly).
• The 'Connect from anywhere' panel now clearly labels the tunnel link and adds a Copy button.
• Security dashboard recommendations each get a Fix button that resolves the item directly instead of just describing it.
• Fixed Ember Browser failing to load for some users — pinned PyQt6/PyQt6-WebEngine to matching versions.

Builds on 1.9.0's Ember Link connect-from-anywhere and 1.8.x's in-app Terminal + Parallel Agent Tasks.
